Frequently Asked Questions

What is the minimum order for OEM/private label?

OEM minimums: Logo only - 100 units per model, Custom packaging - 500 units, Custom color - 100 units per color, Full custom product - 500-1000 units (depends on complexity). We are flexible for promising brands and can phase in higher volumes over time.

What is the cost for OEM customization?

OEM costs vary: Logo printing - $0.30-$1.00 per unit (MOQ 100), Custom packaging - $1.50-$3.00 per unit (MOQ 500), Custom color - +5% (MOQ 100 per color), New mold - $5,000-$20,000 (amortized over orders). We will provide a detailed quote based on your requirements.

Can you help with product development and design?

Yes, we have an in-house R&D team that can help with: Concept development, 3D CAD modeling, Prototype making, Testing and validation, Design for manufacturing (DFM). We love working on innovative new products!
